faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes, tandem paragliding is a very safe activity. All our pilots are certified by AVLM and APPI, and we carry flight insurance for every passenger. We inspect equipment before each flight and only fly when weather conditions are ideal.
faq.a2: No, you don't need any experience for tandem flights. Your pilot handles everything: takeoff, flight, and landing. You just need to follow simple instructions and enjoy the view.
faq.a3: All our flights include transport to the launch site, flight insurance, complete equipment, and a certified instructor. The Peñon Flight also includes GoPro photos and video, and the XC includes INSTA360 video and private transport.
faq.a4: The Classic Flight lasts 20 minutes, the Peñon Flight 35 minutes, and the XC Experience between 45 and 60 minutes. Times may vary depending on flight conditions.
faq.a5: Comfortable clothing, closed shoes, sunscreen, and an adventurous attitude. We provide all the technical equipment you need. In winter we suggest bringing a light jacket.
faq.a6: Yes, you can cancel up to 24 hours before the flight at no cost. If weather conditions don't allow flying, we reschedule at no additional charge.
faq.q7: Is there an age or weight limit?
faq.a7: Minimum age is 6 years (with parent/guardian authorization). Maximum weight is 110 kg. There's no upper age limit — our oldest passenger was 82 years old!
faq.q8: What time of year can you fly?
faq.a8: We fly year-round, but the best season is October through May when thermal conditions are ideal. Valle de Bravo has hosted the Paragliding World Cup 5 times thanks to its world-class flying conditions.

beginner.name: Beginner
beginner.description: Your first step as a pilot. Learn the basics of paragliding, from ground control to your first supervised flights.

pilot.name: Pilot
pilot.description: Complete training to obtain your pilot license. Includes thermal flying techniques, navigation, and emergency procedures.

advanced.name: XC Advanced
advanced.description: For licensed pilots looking to improve their cross-country skills at one of the best sites in the world.

courses.certText: All our courses are recognized by the AVLM (Mexican Free Flight Association) and APPI (Association of Paragliding Pilots and Instructors). Upon completing the Pilot course, you receive your official license to fly independently in Mexico and over 40 APPI-affiliated countries.

why.title: Why VuelaValle?
why.reason1Text: We only fly. No generic tours or tourist activities. Every day we perfect our craft, and it shows in every flight.
why.reason2Text: Each of our instructors has completed over 1,000 flights. Experience can't be improvised, and your safety depends on it.
why.reason3Text: Valle de Bravo has hosted the Paragliding World Cup 5 times. The thermal conditions and landscape make it one of the best flying sites on the planet.

cta.title: Ready to fly?
cta.subtitle: Book your flight today and experience the flight of a lifetime.
